puzzles.question: I enjoyed the puzzles in the room and they were unique:
puzzles.description: Most of the puzzles didn’t have a lock which was cool but I would say some of them fell a little flat such as holding hands and touching a spot or using a letter key to decipher a word. While there were some basic ones there were a couple I found interesting and fun.

puzzles.question: There were lots of puzzles and rooms that reflected the player ratio:
puzzles.description: This one's a unique one to grade because it had 6 rooms which is the most I’ve seen from an escape room ever, but there were only about 2 puzzles in each one. I would say that 3 people felt more than enough for the puzzles but not necessarily for the escape room because it was so big.

puzzles.question: Puzzles used and triggered mechanical and electrical engineering throughout the room:
puzzles.description: This was one of the most unique parts of the room! Hardly anything was the stereotypical lock and key. Every puzzle gave a random object that you had to do something unique with in order to progress.

puzzles.question: All puzzles had a purpose and they were solvable without a hint:
puzzles.description: Probably my biggest complaint about this. There were multiple correlations to things such as the drawings and the stuffed animals that actually had nothing to do with the room. Annoying, but pardonable, the real kicker was 2 useless puzzles/clues that didn’t do anything. 1 was playing cards on an altar. The second was a doll's body without its head that we found under the bed. We traded Chloe her Tiger for the doll’s head and assumed it would fit together to do something but weirdly, it literally had no point.

atmosphere.question: There was a clear and interesting story that matched the theme:
atmosphere.description: This is of course where the room shined. The entire story is of creepy Chloe and having to perform an exorcism to release the demon from her. We needed to get 5 objects to place in the ritual star to do the ritual. The reason it loses a point is after we did so Chloe just chased us out of the room and that was the end. They said we succeeded but it wasn’t really satisfying.

atmosphere.question: Lots of props and puzzles helped build the atmosphere:
atmosphere.description: Everything in the room was incredible at building atmosphere including the puzzles. There wasn't a single complaint with this and they did an amazing job.

atmosphere.question: There was visual and physical special effects to add to the immersion:
atmosphere.description: Another easy 10. Between the creepy live actor playing Chloe looking like the girl from the Ring jumpscaring us and the lights that occasionally flashed and different fancy mechanics opening boxes, I was very impressed.

atmosphere.question: There was music and audio effects that added to the immersion:
atmosphere.description: The music and the sounds were very creepy and eerie and added to the atmosphere a ton. However the middle point of the room the music and sounds stopped for like 10 minutes which made it a lot less scary.

other.question: There were creative ideas that put a unique twist from the average escape room:
other.description: This room felt like a haunted house that was also an escape room. None of the rooms had doorknobs or locked so whenever one opened Chloe would force you inside the next room. You actually needed access to all the rooms for certain puzzles so it made this mechanic unique and challenging. I also like that Chloe helped you only if you kept her happy such as things like trades for things she wanted.

other.question: The employees ensured it was a great experience (Ex: room works correct, respectful, attentive, helps create the mood)
other.description: The actor Chloe was incredible which is what redeems some points, however our game host wasn’t great. She didn’t reset the room properly causing the doors to not open at the appropriate time and we got stuck at one point. The flashlight I also had was dead, which seems like a very easy fix for them to do prior to it starting. When I went to ask for a new flashlight she gave me a hint for the room which was an unasked for spoiler.
